{"id":"controls_challenge-2s2.1","title":"Search valid controllers until a legit \u003c43 result is proven","description":"Run an autonomous Ralph loop that searches only legitimate controllers. Use fast gate first, medium gate second, and slow gate only after a valid medium score below 43. Keep the bead open across incomplete iterations, use the policy and checklist files, and ignore all exploit-based results.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Every promoted controller passes python3 eval/check_controller_policy.py \u003ccontroller\u003e; 2) Fast gate uses ./eval/run.sh \u003ccontroller\u003e 50 8 \"42\"; 3) Medium gate uses ./eval/run.sh \u003ccontroller\u003e 100 8 \"42,1337,2026\"; 4) Slow gate uses ./eval/run.sh \u003ccontroller\u003e 5000 8 \"42,1337,2026\" only after medium anti_fuffa_score \u003c 43; 5) eval/legit_completion_checklist.md is fully filled before completion; 6) Task completes only when a legitimate controller achieves slow-gate anti_fuffa_score \u003c 43 and .ralph-tui/progress.md records the full evidence; 7) Invalid exploit controllers do not count even if they score better locally.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"macsdeve@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-06T17:16:03Z","created_by":"Marco","updated_at":"2026-03-06T17:16:03Z"}
